case_title: YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE INC R O VS COMMERCIAL CARRIER INC. R/O

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE INC R O AS TO DEFENDANT COMMERCIAL CARRIER INC. R/O ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-20-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT COMMERCIAL CARRIER INC. R/O
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $168.26 FILED BY COMMERCIAL CARRIER INC. R/O AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE INC R O ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-20-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE INC R O

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE INC R O RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COMMERCIAL CARRIER INC. R/O $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $56.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,556.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT COMMERCIAL CARRIER INC. R/O IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE INC R O STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT COMMERCIAL CARRIER INC. R/O
